metadata.description: Middleware component catalog - the IP that stamps onto new projects

harnesses.description: Schema-validated assessment (v9.50): MCP constraints, agent attribution, plain-text summary mandate

scripts.name: scripts/intent_router.py
scripts.description: Gemini Flash intent classification - 3 routes: firestore, chromadb, web

scripts.name: scripts/firestore_query.py
scripts.description: Firestore query execution with G34 post-filter and Python-side rating sort (v9.44)

scripts.name: scripts/telegram_bot.py
scripts.description: Telegram bot with 3-route retrieval, session memory, rating sort, systemd watchdog, P3 logging

scripts.name: scripts/generate_artifacts.py
scripts.description: Artifact generator (v9.50) with render_report_markdown() and schema-validated summary prioritization

scripts.name: scripts/run_evaluator.py
scripts.description: Schema-validated Qwen evaluator (v9.50) with agent attribution parsing and MCP selection validation

scripts.name: scripts/build_registry_v2.py
scripts.description: RAG-augmented iteration registry builder with 45-min batch timeout

scripts.name: scripts/enrich_counties.py
scripts.description: Reverse geocode coordinates to counties via Nominatim for TripleDB entities

scripts.name: scripts/embed_archive.py
scripts.description: Archive document embedder for ChromaDB vector store

scripts.name: scripts/query_rag.py
scripts.description: ChromaDB semantic search for dev history retrieval

scripts.name: scripts/brave_search.py
scripts.description: Brave Search API wrapper for web search route

scripts.name: scripts/analyze_events.py
scripts.description: Event log analyzer for P3 diligence reporting

scripts.name: pipeline/scripts/phase1_acquire.py
scripts.description: Phase 1: Acquire audio from YouTube playlist via yt-dlp

scripts.name: pipeline/scripts/phase2_transcribe.py
scripts.description: Phase 2: Transcribe audio to timestamped JSON via faster-whisper (CUDA)

scripts.name: pipeline/scripts/phase3_extract.py
scripts.description: Phase 3: Extract structured entities via Gemini Flash API

scripts.name: pipeline/scripts/phase4_normalize.py
scripts.description: Phase 4: Normalize extracted entities with Thompson Schema

scripts.name: pipeline/scripts/phase6_enrich.py
scripts.description: Phase 6: Enrich entities via Google Places API (New)

scripts.name: pipeline/scripts/phase7_load.py
scripts.description: Phase 7: Load enriched JSONL into Cloud Firestore

utils.name: scripts/utils/iao_logger.py
utils.description: Structured JSONL event logger for all agent communications

utils.name: scripts/utils/ollama_config.py
utils.description: Ollama defaults (think:false), eval defaults, batch defaults (45-min timeout), GEMINI_MODEL constant

data_stores.name: data/eval_schema.json
data_stores.description: Strict JSON schema (v9.50) - score max 9, constrained MCPs, root-level summary field

data_stores.description: Thompson Schema field reference for intent routing
